title: Implement logout (signOut + redirect)
description: Add a logout function callable from any page. Clears the Supabase session and redirects to the homepage.
acceptance_criteria: A function logOut() exists in a shared auth-utils.js module
Any page with a logout button wires its click to logOut()
After logout, navigating to a protected page redirects back to /login

steps.details: export async function logOut() { await supabase.auth.signOut(); window.location.href = '/'; }

export async function requireAuth() { const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession(); if (!session) { window.location.href = '/login'; } return session; } — import and call this at the top of every protected page.
